settings.question: How do I choose my size with confidence?
settings.answer: Start with the measurements listed on each product page. Most ZENORA styles should be described through clean, softly relaxed lines, supported by model notes and garment measurements.

settings.question: How long does delivery take from order to arrival?
settings.answer: Use market-specific delivery windows for the United States and Europe and avoid vague timing promises. A launch-stage setup can position US delivery around 6-10 business days and many European routes around 4-8 business days.

settings.question: Can I return or exchange an item if the fit is not right?
settings.answer: Most launch-stage brands keep returns simple before adding more complex exchange workflows. State the return window clearly and keep the policy easy to understand across regions.

settings.question: Will I see prices in USD, EUR, or GBP?
settings.answer: Use Shopify Markets to surface local pricing by market. Keep displayed pricing consistent with your selected market and ad landing pages.

settings.question: Will I need to pay customs duties or import taxes?
settings.answer: That depends on destination and your tax configuration. Explain clearly at checkout whether duties are collected upfront or on delivery so customers understand total landed cost before placing the order.

settings.question: How can I reach customer support if I need help before ordering?
settings.answer: Use email-first support during launch. You can add separate inboxes for creators, wholesale, and press as the brand grows, while keeping support@zenora.com as the main customer contact.
